'''Gentik''' was a manufacturing corporation. They produced several products for [[Droid/Legends|droids]] including the [[Mk I EM System]], the [[AVX-1 Holographic Storage System]] (with [[Harris (company)|Harris]]), and the [[AX-1 Espionage Brain]] (with [[Columni]]).

==Sources==
